text: 2026-07-09: metadata pass largely done — Titles/Descriptions/0.1.0/NEWS/URL/BugReports for all four backends; per-subdir check CI job added (gates on ERROR). REMAINING: clear pre-existing check WARNINGs in each backend (undeclared Matrix/amatrix::: imports in R code, legacy undocumented exports — mlx 3W1N, metal 2W1N, arrayfire 3W, opencl 3W), then tighten the CI gate to error-on-warning.
